privileged_info_summary: The circle_fill task creates a circular selection in the center of an 800x600 pixel Unsplash JPEG image and fills it with pure red (#FF0000). The task uses real, publicly-accessible Unsplash images (photo IDs 1557682224-5b8590cd9ec5 and 1506905925346-21bda4d32df4). Success requires meeting 3 of 4 criteria: circular shape (circularity ≥0.65 using 4π×Area/Perimeter²), red color (RGB(255,0,0)), centered position (within central 70% of image), and appropriate size (2-30% of image area, 100-500 pixel diameter). The verifier achieves a score of 3/4 = 75% for pass threshold. Task timeout is 90 seconds with max 7 steps. Reward type is sparse (binary pass/fail with score 0-100).
